steps.title: Track the shared claim
steps.content: Text 1 says elderberry bushes provide shade that protects chia flowers from harsh heat and light. Text 2 says O'odham farmers plant chia flowers in the shade of elderberry bushes for protection from the sun and heat.

steps.title: Choose the agreement
steps.content: Both authors would agree that elderberry bushes can shade and protect chia flowers. B adds a refinement not discussed, C compares seed production without support, and D reverses the shading relationship. The answer is A.
